summary: Microsoft FQ2 FY2026 (Dec 2025) EPS: consensus $3.81, range $3.55-3.97 (31 analysts). My median ~$3.88, accounting for typical beat pattern.
content: Analyst consensus: $3.81 (31 analysts, Yahoo Finance). Range $3.55-$3.97. Year-ago quarter GAAP EPS was $3.23 (but had $1.1B unusual charges). Normalized year-ago was ~$3.35. Revenue growth accelerating (~18% YoY in FQ1 FY2026). Microsoft beats EPS ~68-70% of quarters, typical beat $0.05-0.15. Simulation median: $3.88, mean: $3.86, std: $0.13.
